name: Meat 'n Cheddar Loaf
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients thoroughly.
2. Pack the mixture firmly into an 8-1/2 inches x 4-1/2 inches x 2-1/2 inches loaf pan.
3. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for about 1 hour and 15 minutes.
4. Let stand for 5 minutes before slicing.
